subcodes.first_line: A mention from Us unto one among the servants, that he may draw nigh unto God, the All-Knowing, the All-Wise. O servant [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا الی احد من العباد لیقربه الی الله العلیم الحکیم ان یا عبد ان
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @spiritual transformation, @mystical themes, @knowledge; recognition of God, @the power of words; of speech, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
